srus.capacity_note: stable local capacity, not intended as a cheap cross-chain target
stable local capacity, not intended as a cheap cross-chain target
standard local queue, fast cross-chain shared capacity, high collaboration cost
standard local queue, fast cross-chain shared capacity, high collaboration cost
balanced reserve capacity for load relief, moderate-high collaboration cost
balanced reserve capacity for load relief, moderate-high collaboration cost

conflict_design.fast_expensive_vs_slow_cheap: U2/U3 are fast and expensive; U1/U4 are slow and cheap; U5/U6 are balanced.
conflict_design.intra_vs_cross_chain: Intra-chain choices keep low transport and zero collaboration cost; cross-chain choices can be faster or better balanced but pay distance/profile dependent costs.
conflict_design.load_balance_vs_cross_cost: Balanced/fast remote SRUs can reduce completion time or load concentration, but cross fixed cost, variable rate, and transport cost increase with distance and profile.

repair_design.main_goal: Cross-chain choices pay extra transport, coordination and management cost, but may reduce makespan by using fast or reserve shared capacity.

sru_roles.U1/U2: stable local standard resources; not cheap cross-chain targets
sru_roles.U3/U4: fast shared resources for cross-chain time reduction with high collaboration cost
sru_roles.U5/U6: balanced reserve resources for load relief with moderate-high collaboration cost

repair_design.cost_logic: Any cross-chain assignment pays fixed coordination cost, distance penalty, higher transport cost, and variable management rate.
repair_design.time_logic: Fast shared and reserve SRUs can have shorter cross-chain processing time, while local transport remains cheaper and simpler.

notes.duplication_method: jobs duplicated once; SRUs, machines, processing options, transport, and cross-chain cost logic preserved
